title: KAV - Tarpaulin waterproof heavy duty 130 GSM LARGE - 6M x 9 M (20ftx 30 FT) with Eyelets ground sheet Multifunctional Quality Cover Tarp (Green)
features: 𝐌𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐈𝐀𝐋: This camping tarp is made of heavy high-quality 130 GSM PP/PE tarpaulin and rubber reinforced corners. All edges stitched with double material

𝐂𝐎𝐀𝐓𝐄𝐃 𝐎𝐍 𝐁𝐎𝐓𝐇 𝐒𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐒: This durable reinforced tarpaulins protective cover is UV-stabilized, waterproof, mould-resistant, and washable. This tarpaulin cover sheet will protect your surface and objects from damage.
𝐔𝐕 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐂𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: UV protection is built into the film, ensuring that your garden accessories, grill, and sandpit are well protected from harmful UV rays.

𝐓𝐄𝐀𝐑-𝐑𝐄𝐒𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐍𝐓:Thanks to strengthened corners with rubber edges, the water-resistant tarpaulin is tear-resistant. It's additionally washable, mould-resistant, proof against micro organism and chemicals.

𝐖𝐈𝐃𝐄𝐋𝐘 𝐀𝐏𝐏𝐋𝐈𝐂𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: Tarpaulins are used to cover and secure items both inside and outside the home. Also ideal for use in the home and in the workplace, such as during building and restoration projects.
description: Product Description Reliable Protection for All Needs The KAV Tarpaulin is a heavy-duty, waterproof cover designed to provide exceptional protection for a wide range of uses. Whether for outdoor storage, camping, or as a groundsheet, this multifunctional tarpaulin is built to withstand harsh conditions, ensuring your belongings stay dry and protected. Durable with SS Grommets The KAV Tarpaulin features stainless steel (SS) grommets placed every 2 feet for secure fastening. Fabric patches are strategically added to reinforce the tarp, ensuring enhanced durability and strength, making it perfect for heavy-duty outdoor applications. KAV Heavy Duty Waterproof Tarpaulin – Ultimate Protection for All Uses The KAV Tarpaulin is engineered for durability and long-lasting protection. Perfect for various outdoor needs, it features: Waterproof – Keeps your belongings dry in all conditions. UV Resistant – Protects from sun damage and fading. Tear & Puncture Resistant – Stands up to rough handling and harsh environments. Reinforced Edges – Ensures added strength and longevity. Eyelets – For secure and easy anchoring. Polypropylene & Polyethylene – Built from high-quality materials for extra durability. Versatile and Mould-Resistant Tarpaulin in 3 Colors The KAV Tarpaulin comes in three vibrant colors—blue, grey, and green—offering versatility for various uses. It’s mould-resistant and washable, ensuring long-lasting durability and easy maintenance. Ideal for outdoor protection, it stays fresh and functional through every season. Protection with Polypropylene and Polyethylene Crafted from Polypropylene (PP) and Polyethylene (PE), the KAV Tarpaulin is UV-stabilized for long-lasting protection. Whether it’s a rainy day or sunny day, it ensures reliable performance, keeping your items safe from the elements in any weather condition. Ultimate Waterproof Protection for All Weather The KAV Tarpaulin offers reliable waterproof protection, ensuring your belongings stay safe and dry in any weather. Perfect for outdoor use, it shields against rain, snow, and harsh sun conditions. Grommets and Hot Fusion Fixed Edges for All Uses The KAV Tarpaulin features durable grommets and hot fusion fixed edges, making it ideal for building, garden, farm, and many more uses. It provides reliable, long-lasting protection in any environment or weather condition. Reliable Protection with Rope Binding The KAV Tarpaulin, made from 130 GSM material, features secure binding with rope for easy fastening. Perfect for protecting boats, cars, and other valuables from the elements, ensuring long-lasting durability and protection.
